import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { authAPI } from '../services/api'; function Login() { const [formData, setFormData] = useState({ email: '', password: '', }); const [error, setError] = useState(''); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false); const handleChange = (e) => { setFormData({ ...formData, [e.target.name]: e.target.value, }); }; const handleSubmit = async (e) => { e.preventDefault(); setError(''); setLoading(true); try { const response = await authAPI.login(formData); localStorage.setItem('token', response.data.token); localStorage.setItem('user', JSON.stringify(response.data)); alert('Login successful!'); } catch (err) { setError('Invalid credentials. Please try again.'); } finally { setLoading(false); } }; return (
